sections.title: Preamble
sections.content: Protecting your personal data is a priority for Ludokan. This Privacy Policy aims to inform you transparently about the nature of the data collected, the purposes of its processing, the applicable legal bases, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – Regulation (EU) 2016/679) and applicable French law, including the law of 6 January 1978 as amended (Informatique et Libertés), the SREN Act (2024) and the Digital Services Act (DSA).

sections.title: 1. Data Controller Identity
sections.content:
The data controller for personal data collected via the Ludokan platform is:
– Name: Ludokan
– Nature: End-of-training project – Community digital game library
– DPO / GDPR contact: dpo@ludokan.fr
– Address: [To be completed before launch]

sections.title: 2. Personal Data Collected
sections.content:
Ludokan collects two categories of data:

2.1 Directly collected data
– Identity data: surname, first name, username
– Contact data: email address
– Demographic data: date of birth / age range
– Login data: identifiers and passwords (stored in hashed form)

2.2 Indirectly collected data
– Behavioral data: game preferences, browsing history
– Collection data: games added to personal library, ratings and reviews
– Communication data: messages exchanged via real-time chat
– Technical data: IP address, browser type, access logs (anonymized via Sentry)

sections.title: 3. Purposes and Legal Bases
sections.content:
3.1 Contract performance (art. 6.1.b GDPR)
– Creation and management of your user account
– Provision of platform features
– Management of real-time chat and notifications

3.2 Consent (art. 6.1.a GDPR)
– Placing non-essential cookies
– Sending marketing communications and newsletters
– Processing data of minors under 15

3.3 Legitimate interest (art. 6.1.f GDPR)
– Improving service quality
– Securing the platform and preventing fraud
– Moderating illegal content in accordance with the DSA

3.4 Legal obligation (art. 6.1.c GDPR)
– Age verification and parental consent management
– Retaining logs for legal and security purposes

sections.title: 4. Protection of Minors
sections.content:
Ludokan pays particular attention to the protection of minors, in accordance with Article 8 of the GDPR and the SREN Act (2024).
– Age verification is mandatory upon registration.
– Access to social features is blocked for users under 15 without prior parental consent.
– Enhanced chat filtering is applied for users under 18.
– Parents or legal guardians may exercise GDPR rights on behalf of the minor by contacting the DPO.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
sections.content:
Ludokan uses cookies and similar technologies. On your first visit, a consent banner allows you to accept or decline the following categories:
– Strictly necessary cookies: essential for the platform to function (session, security). No consent required.
– Performance / analytics cookies: anonymized audience measurement. Consent required.
– Personalization cookies: remembering your preferences (language, theme). Consent required.

You can change your preferences at any time via the 'Cookie settings' link at the bottom of each page.

sections.title: 6. Data Sharing and Recipients
sections.content:
Ludokan does not sell or rent your data to third parties. Your data may only be shared with:
– Technical subcontractors: hosting providers, authentication and messaging services, monitoring tools.
– IGDB API (Twitch/Amazon): game catalog consultation.
– Moderation tools: content moderation service.
– Competent authorities: in cases of legal obligation or judicial requisition.

sections.title: 7. Data Retention
sections.content:
– Active account data: retained for the duration of account use, then deleted within 3 years of the last login.
– Message data (chat): retained for 12 months for moderation and security purposes.
– Technical logs (IP, access): anonymized within 30 days, retained for 12 months in anonymous form.
– Parental consent data: retained until the minor's 18th birthday.
– Accounting data (subscriptions): 10 years in accordance with the Commercial Code.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
sections.content:
Ludokan implements appropriate technical and organizational measures:
– Encrypted communications via HTTPS (TLS 1.3)
– Password hashing (bcrypt)
– Anonymization of monitoring logs (Sentry)
– Strict access control to databases (least privilege principle)
– Privacy by design: data minimization from the design stage

In the event of a data breach, Ludokan undertakes to notify the CNIL within 72 hours, in accordance with Article 33 of the GDPR.

sections.title: 9. Your Rights
sections.content:
In accordance with Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR, you have the following rights:
– Right of access (art. 15): obtain a copy of your processed data.
– Right of rectification (art. 16): correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
– Right to erasure (art. 17): request deletion of your data.
– Right to restriction (art. 18): temporarily suspend the use of your data.
– Right to portability (art. 20): receive your data in a structured format.
– Right to object (art. 21): object to processing based on legitimate interest.
– Right to withdraw consent: withdraw your consent at any time.

To exercise your rights, contact our DPO: dpo@ludokan.fr

sections.title: 13. Contact
sections.content:
For any questions regarding this policy or the exercise of your rights:
– Email: dpo@ludokan.fr
– Mail: [Address to be completed before launch]

We undertake to respond to any request within a maximum of one month (art. 12 GDPR).

sections.title: Preamble
sections.content:
These Terms of Use (hereinafter 'ToU') govern access to and use of the Ludokan platform, a community digital game library accessible via the website ludokan.fr.

Any use of the Platform implies full acceptance of these ToU. The ToU comply with the GDPR, the SREN Act (2024), the Digital Services Act (DSA), the Consumer Code and applicable French law.

sections.title: Article 1. Platform Publisher
sections.content:
The Ludokan Platform is published by:
– Name: Ludokan
– Nature: End-of-training project
– Contact: contact@ludokan.fr
– DPO / GDPR: dpo@ludokan.fr
– Address: [To be completed before launch]

sections.title: Article 2. Platform Access
sections.content:
2.1 Access conditions
Access is reserved for:
– Adults (18 years and over) by right;
– Minors aged 15 to 17, subject to prior acceptance by a parent or legal guardian;
– Minors under 15, only with explicit parental consent, in accordance with Article 8 of the GDPR and the SREN Act (2024).

2.2 Account creation
Registration requires the provision of accurate and up-to-date information: surname, first name (or username), valid email address, date of birth.

sections.title: Article 3. Services Offered
sections.content:
Ludokan offers the following services:
– Game catalog: discovery, search and consultation of game profiles from the IGDB API (Twitch/Amazon).
– Personal collection management: adding games to your library, organization and tracking.
– Recommendation system: personalized suggestions based on your preferences.
– Social features: matchmaking, real-time chat, community notifications.
– Premium subscriptions: subject to specific pricing conditions displayed before any purchase.

sections.title: Article 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content:
4.1 Platform content
All elements of the Ludokan Platform are protected by copyright and trademark law. Any unauthorized reproduction, representation or exploitation is strictly prohibited.

4.2 Third-party content (video games)
Names, images, descriptions and other elements relating to video games displayed are the property of their respective publishers. Ludokan uses the IGDB API under a public display license.

4.3 User content
By publishing content on the Platform, the user grants Ludokan a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to use it for the purposes of operating and improving the service.

sections.title: Article 5. Rules of Conduct and Moderation
Article 6. Personal Data Protection
sections.content:
The processing of your personal data is governed by Ludokan's Privacy Policy, available at ludokan.fr/confidentialite.

For any questions regarding your data: dpo@ludokan.fr — Response guaranteed within 1 month (art. 12 GDPR).

sections.title: Article 7. Financial Conditions and Right of Withdrawal
sections.content:
7.1 Free services
Access to Ludokan's basic features (catalog, collection, chat) is free.

7.2 Premium subscriptions
Certain advanced features may be offered as paid subscriptions. The price, duration and conditions will be clearly displayed before any purchase validation.

7.3 Right of withdrawal
In accordance with Article L221-18 of the Consumer Code, any subscription taken out online benefits from a 14-day withdrawal period from the date of subscription, without reason or penalty.

sections.title: Article 8. Liability
sections.content:
8.1 Ludokan's liability
Ludokan undertakes to implement all reasonable means to ensure the availability and security of the Platform. However, Ludokan cannot be held liable for damages resulting from a service interruption or technical failure.

8.2 User liability
Each user is solely responsible for the content they publish and the interactions they engage in on the Platform.

8.3 Hyperlinks
The Platform may contain links to third-party sites. Ludokan declines all responsibility for their content.

sections.title: Article 10. Termination and Account Deletion
sections.content: The user may at any time request deletion of their account from their personal space or by contacting customer service at contact@ludokan.fr. Deletion results in the erasure of all personal data, subject to applicable legal retention periods.

sections.title: Article 13. Applicable Law and Jurisdiction
sections.content:
These ToU are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and failing amicable resolution within 30 days, the competent courts of Ludokan's registered office will have sole jurisdiction.

In accordance with Article L616-1 of the Consumer Code, users residing in France may use a consumer mediator free of charge in the event of an unresolved dispute.

sections.title: Article 14. Contact
sections.content:
For any questions regarding these ToU:
– General email: contact@ludokan.fr
– DPO / GDPR: dpo@ludokan.fr
– Accessibility: accessibilite@ludokan.fr
– Mail: [Address to be completed before launch]
